records.question: Which browsers became compatible starting exactly in the year 2010?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id WHERE T2.compatible_since_year = 2010

records.question: Which browsers named Firefox are compatible with an accelerator?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE browser.name = 'Firefox'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id WHERE T1.name = 'Firefox'

records.question: Which browsers have a market share of exactly 28.96?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
WHERE browser.market_share = 28.96
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM browser WHERE market_share = 28.96

records.question: What browsers named Opera with a market share of 1.2 are compatible since 2009 or later with the fasTun accelerator that has a client of All, connection is Any, and an operating system containing Any?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.operating_system LIKE '%Any%' AND web_client_accelerator.connection = 'Any' AND browser.name = 'Opera' AND browser.market_share = 1.2 AND web_client_accelerator.name = 'fasTun' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year >= 2009 AND web_client_accelerator.client = 'All'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id INNER JOIN Web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T2.accelerator_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name = 'Opera' AND T1.market_share = 1.2 AND T2.compatible_since_year >= 2009 AND T3.Operating_system LIKE '%Any%' AND T3.Connection = 'Any' AND T3.name = 'fasTun' AND T3.Client = 'All'

records.question: Which browsers have the name Firefox?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
WHERE browser.name = 'Firefox'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM browser WHERE name = 'Firefox'

records.question: Which browsers have a market share of at least 28.96 and have been compatible since 2010 with accelerators where the client is End User, ISP?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE browser.market_share >= 28.96 AND web_client_accelerator.client = 'End User, ISP' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2010
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id INNER JOIN Web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T2.accelerator_id = T3.id WHERE T1.market_share >= 28.96 AND T2.compatible_since_year = 2010 AND T3.Client = 'End User, ISP'

records.question: Which browsers with a market share of at least 1.2 are compatible with accelerators where the client is user?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE web_client_accelerator.client = 'user' AND browser.market_share >= 1.2
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id INNER JOIN Web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T2.accelerator_id = T3.id WHERE T1.market_share >= 1.2 AND T3.Client = 'user'

records.question: Which browsers named Safari have a market share exactly 8.54 and have been compatible since at least 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE browser.market_share = 8.54 AND browser.name = 'Safari' AND accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year >= 1996
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id WHERE T1.market_share = 8.54 AND T1.name = 'Safari' AND T2.compatible_since_year >= 1996

records.question: Which browsers named Firefox have a market share of at least 18.11 and have been compatible since exactly 2007?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT browser.id FROM browser
JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser ON browser.id = accelerator_compatible_browser.browser_id
WHERE accelerator_compatible_browser.compatible_since_year = 2007 AND browser.name = 'Firefox' AND browser.market_share >= 18.11
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 WHERE T1.name = 'Firefox' AND T1.market_share >= 18.11 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 WHERE T1.id = T2.browser_id AND T2.compatible_since_year = 2007 )

SELECT browser.id FROM browser

JOIN web_client_accelerator ON accelerator_compatible_browser.accelerator_id = web_client_accelerator.id
WHERE browser.name = 'Firefox'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.id FROM browser AS T1 INNER JOIN accelerator_compatible_browser AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.browser_id INNER JOIN Web_client_accelerator AS T3 ON T2.accelerator_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name = 'Firefox'
